name: Magnesium Hydroxide
description: An inorganic compound that creates an alkaline skin surface inhospitable to odor-causing bacteria, offering a gentler alternative to baking soda in deodorants.
appearance: White powder or milky white suspension (Milk of Magnesia)
solubility: 0.009 g/L at 25°C (very poorly soluble in water)
chemistry: Creates alkaline skin surface inhibiting odor bacteria. Stays on surface — doesn't absorb. Gentler than baking soda. Available as Milk of Magnesia.
